result:
All done. Here's what was created/modified:

**New file:**
- `ui/src/ui/views/channels.matrix.ts` — Matrix-specific channel card component showing:
  - Homeserver URL (`baseUrl`)
  - Configured / Running status
  - Last start and last probe timestamps
  - Error callout when `lastError` is present
  - Probe result with user ID, elapsed time, status code, and error details
  - Multi-account support (per-account cards with homeserver, running/configured state, last inbound, probe user ID)
  - Config section and Probe button

**Modified files:**
- `ui/src/ui/types.ts` — Added `MatrixProbe` and `MatrixStatus` types
- `ui/src/ui/views/channels.types.ts` — Added `MatrixStatus` import and `matrix` field to `ChannelsChannelData`
- `ui/src/ui/views/channels.ts` — Imported `renderMatrixCard`, extracted `matrix` status from snapshot, added `case "matrix"` to the card switch, and added `"matrix"` to the default channel order

The card follows the same pattern as Discord/Slack/Telegram cards (status list, error callout, probe callout, config section, probe button) and supports multi-account rendering like the Telegram card.
